calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Warren Sullivan for Carol Olmsted.

Mr. Sullivan stated that Erica Brewer has no issue other than Jessie and that Jessie has no issue (endorsed copies of declarations from Erica and Jessie provided in open Court). Mr. Sullivan also addressed the issue of timeliness of the disclaimer, stated that the Assessor's Office indicated that they will abide by the order of the Court and that the Parties received advice from a Lawyer regarding the gift tax. Mr. Sullivan also provided an endorsed copy of his declaration regarding discussion he had with the Assessor's Office. The Petition for Final Distribution was taken under submission for the Court to review said documents.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. (Not Reported)
